name: ESP_ERR_OTA_BASE
comment: Base error code for ota_ops api

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_PARTITION_CONFLICT
comment: Error if request was to write or erase the current running partition

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_SELECT_INFO_INVALID
comment: Error if OTA data partition contains invalid content

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_VALIDATE_FAILED
comment: Error if OTA app image is invalid

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_SMALL_SEC_VER
comment: Error if the firmware has a secure version less than the running firmware.

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_ROLLBACK_FAILED
comment: Error if flash does not have valid firmware in passive partition and hence rollback is not possible

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_ROLLBACK_INVALID_STATE
comment: Error if current active firmware is still marked in pending validation state (ESP_OTA_IMG_PENDING_VERIFY), essentially first boot of firmware image post upgrade and hence firmware upgrade is not possible

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_ALREADY_IN_PROGRESS
comment: Error if another OTA operation is already in progress on the same partition

name: ESP_ERR_OTA_SPI_MODE_MISMATCH
comment: Error if the firmware's SPI flash mode doesn't match the running firmware
